creator: keith@master.key.net.au
text:
I left a trafshow session running on a virtual console. I was latter logged out from that console by a kill -HUP to the shell. The screen was still all blue. Some time later I logged in on that console again and my password came up in bright yellow as I typed it. I could still log in OK.

How-To-Repeat: 
Run trafshow on a console...log out your shell by kill -1 from another window and log back in. I cant reproduce this however...you might have to leave trafshow running for a few hours and then the console idle for a few hours after being logged out.
